understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to finish the current level (BP35) by navigating the grid to reach the goal gem tile marked `+` without dying, using up to 2 attempts with a 50-turn budget per attempt, and then continue clearing levels until winning the game.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Each turn I could MOVE_LEFT or MOVE_RIGHT; after the horizontal move, gravity automatically carried the character in the current gravity direction until landing on a solid tile, hitting a hazard, or reaching `+`. CLICK let me interact with clickable tiles (notably removing breakable `x` blocks) by specifying a target [x,y], usually to open a fall path or change reachable landings; UNDO would revert the previous action. Landing on spike tiles (`u`/`v`) immediately ended the attempt, so moves had to be planned using the landing previews (left_landing/right_landing and corridor_scan) to avoid hazards and prioritize passage columns that drop into new sections.
